cookies.reset.confirm: Delete the saved cookies.txt file? The next YouTube download may require logging in again.
cookies.reset.missing: cookies.txt was not found. There is nothing to delete.
cookies.import.title: Import cookies
cookies.import.intro: Paste cookies from the clipboard or load a file. Supported formats: Netscape cookies.txt, raw Cookie header, and JSON export.
cookies.import.placeholder: Paste cookies here or load them from a file.
cookies.import.clipboard_empty: The clipboard is empty. Copy cookies first.
cookies.import.empty: Paste cookies or load them from a file first.
cookies.import.invalid: Unsupported cookies format. Expected Netscape cookies.txt, raw Cookie header, or JSON export.
cookies.import.file_failed:
Failed to open or save the cookies file:
{error}
cookies.import.editor_tip: Paste raw Cookie header, Netscape cookies.txt, or JSON export here before import.
cookies.import.paste_tip: Paste copied cookies text from the clipboard into the editor.
cookies.import.load_tip: Open cookies from a .txt or .json file and place them into the editor.
cookies.import.clear_tip: Clear the editor if you want to paste or load another cookies set.
cookies.import.save_tip: Normalize the cookies and save them into the app's working cookies.txt file.
action.docs.voices: How to choose a model and voice
settings.title: ⚙ Settings
settings.interface_language_tip: Changes the language of menus, buttons, hints, and built-in dialogs in the app.
settings.dub_language_tip: Choose the language into which the video's speech will be translated and dubbed.
settings.tts_model_tip: Choose which speech engine will voice the translation. The available voices and advanced options below depend on this selection.
settings.voice_tip: Select the voice that will read the translated track. The description below explains the current preset.
settings.remove_silence_tip: Trims extra silent fragments in generated speech so phrases sound tighter and the final result stays closer to the original timing.
settings.soft_trim_tip: Preserves a natural voice fade-out at the end of sentences
settings.kokoro_lang_tip: Adjusts the pronunciation or accent variant used by Kokoro voices.
settings.kokoro_speed_tip: Sets how fast Kokoro voices speak relative to their default speed.
settings.f5_quality_tip: Higher NFE improves quality and stability, but noticeably increases generation time.
settings.hide_weak_tip: Hides Kokoro voices rated C- and below. Uncheck it if you need a rare timbre.
settings.smart_hybrid_tip: Smooths abrupt loudness changes so the dubbing and background audio sound more even together.
settings.keep_original_audio_tip: Keeps the source soundtrack under the dub. Disable it if you want only the translated voice in the final video.
settings.volume_tip: Controls how loud the original background audio remains under the dub.
settings.volume_tip_disabled: Enable 'Keep original audio' to adjust the background volume.
settings.jump_cut_tip:
Warning: building the final output will take longer
because the video stream must be fully re-encoded to match the new rhythm.
settings.audio_mix_hint: Background audio will be mixed with the dubbing.
settings.audio_only_hint: Only the dubbed audio will remain in the final video.
settings.model_hint.kokoro: Kokoro voices are sorted from strongest to weakest. The checkbox below hides weaker options rated C- and below.
settings.model_hint.edge: Microsoft voices (internet required): maximum clarity and stability.
settings.model_hint.f5: Heavy neural network for voice cloning from a sample (.wav).
url.input_tooltip: Paste or type a full YouTube video link here. The Start button becomes available as soon as the link is recognized.
url.paste_tooltip_detail: Take the current text from the clipboard and place it into the link field.
url.start_tooltip_ready: Start downloading, transcription, translation, voice generation, and final assembly for the current video.
url.start_tooltip_waiting: Enter a valid YouTube video link to unlock processing.
pipeline.progress_ring_tip: Overall progress of the entire dubbing pipeline from 0% to 100%.
pipeline.progress_bar_tip: Linear progress of all stages combined, including the active step.
pipeline.segment_tip: Shows the current text fragment or the final output path, depending on the active stage.
transcript.export_srt_tip: Export the translated text as timed subtitles in .srt format.
transcript.export_txt_tip: Export the transcript and translation as a readable text file.
transcript.close_tip: Close the transcript window and return to the main screen.
transcript.table_tip: Review timestamps, original phrases, translation, and segment duration before export.
portable.title: Portable mode and data paths
portable.intro_first_run: The app can store all user data in a separate folder: settings, models, logs, jobs, and cookies.
portable.intro_restart: The app can store all user data in a separate folder: settings, models, logs, jobs, and cookies.
portable.data_dir_tip: Folder where the app stores models, jobs, logs, settings, and optional cookies when portable mode is used.
portable.ffmpeg_tip: Optional manual path to ffmpeg.exe. Set it only if automatic detection cannot find ffmpeg on this PC.
portable.cookies_tip: Optional path to cookies.txt for YouTube downloads that require authorization.
portable.cookies_placeholder: Optional. You can choose cookies.txt later.
portable.note: The data folder will store: models, logs, jobs, settings.json and, if needed, cookies.txt.
portable.copy_legacy: Copy current local data to the new portable folder
portable.copy_tip: Useful if models, logs, jobs, settings.json or cookies.txt were previously stored next to the app.
portable.copy_hint: Local data was found in the project root. You can copy it into the new portable folder to avoid configuring everything again.
portable.warning_data_dir: Choose the folder where the portable-version data will be stored.
portable.defaults_tip: Restore the recommended portable paths and clear optional custom files.
portable.apply_tip: Save the selected portable settings. A restart may be required for all changes to apply.
portable.browse_data_tip: Choose the portable data folder from the file system.
runtime.title: Preparing missing components
runtime.intro_startup: The app is preparing required local components.
runtime.intro_manual: The app is preparing the selected local components.
runtime.all_ready: All local components are already ready.
runtime.finished_required_warn: Preparation finished with warnings. Some required components could not be downloaded.
runtime.finished_optional_warn: Base components are ready. Some optional components were not prepared.
runtime.finished_success: All missing components were prepared successfully.
runtime.everything_done: Done: all missing components have been prepared.
docs.section.voices: How to choose a model and voice
docs.browser_tip: Built-in guide with explanations of interface elements, settings, and workflow.
docs.close_tip: Close the help window and return to the main screen.
docs.section_list_tip: Choose a help section here. The article on the right updates immediately.
main.hardware_tooltip: Detected hardware that the app will use for downloading, speech processing, and dubbing.
main.pipeline_tooltip: Shows all processing stages, the current step, progress, ETA, and service messages.
main.log_tooltip: Detailed log of downloads, model preparation, warnings, and errors.
main.stop_tooltip: Stop the current pipeline. The app will cancel the job as safely as possible after the active step responds.
main.transcript_tooltip: Open the recognized transcript and translation after text segments are ready.
main.original_tooltip: Open the downloaded source video for the current job.
main.output_tooltip: Open the final dubbed video after processing finishes.
about.title: About
about.body:
{app_name} v{version}

Local application for dubbing YouTube videos.

GPU: {gpu}

RAM: {ram} GB
